title: AN ACT NAMING THE PALAWAN POLICE PROVINCIAL OFFICE (PALAWAN PPO) TO CAMP HIGINO ACOSTA MENDOZA SR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4253; 109 OG No. 35, 5893 (September 2, 2013); Manila Bulletin, May 27, 2013

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10559, May 17, 2013 ]

AN ACT NAMING THE PALAWAN POLICE PROVINCIAL OFFICE (PALAWAN PPO) TO CAMP HIGINO ACOSTA MENDOZA SR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Palawan Police Provincial Office (Palawan PPO) in

the City of Puerto Princesa, Province of Palawan is hereby named as Camp

Higino Acosta Mendoza Sr.

SEC. 2. The Philippine National Police shall issue the necessary

rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 2. The Philippine National Police shall issue the necessary

rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in a national newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was

finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August

3, 2011 and January 30, 2013, respectively.

(SGD.)

EDWIN B. BELLEN

Acting Senate Secretary

(SGD.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: MAY 17 2013

(SGD.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
